# OutPumper

> OutPumper is a cold email tool that runs as a Microsoft Outlook add-in and sends from your own domain and inbox, with no warmup, no throwaway domains, and no third-party sending servers.

OutPumper is built by The Grow Revenue Company Limited and is part of The Outbound Game ecosystem (https://theoutboundgame.com). It is for B2B founders, salespeople, and agencies who run outbound cold email and want to send from their real Microsoft 365 address instead of rented infrastructure.

## What makes it different
- Sends from your own Outlook and your real domain, so mail comes from the address prospects already trust.
- No warmup period and no need to buy 30 to 50 throwaway domains.
- Your contact data never leaves your Microsoft 365 tenant.
- Smart throttling with an automatic safety stop keeps sending within Microsoft limits.
- Built-in unlimited email verification and automatic bounce blacklisting are included at no extra cost.
- Connects to Google Workspace, SendGrid, Mailgun, Amazon SES, or any SMTP server.

## Pricing
- Pro: 49 US dollars per month, 7-day free trial.
- Lifetime: 497 US dollars one-time, with one year of updates included.
- Agency: 49 US dollars per month plus 15 US dollars per client, 7-day free trial.
- 30-day money-back guarantee on all plans.

## Requirements
- Windows with desktop Outlook connected to a Microsoft 365 account.
